title: Scope
description: Explicit scope declaration. Previously implicit via OU hierarchy; 1.2.0 makes scopes first-class so manifests can reference them by name for memory permissions + type-cell namespacing. Added in schema 1.2.0.

name.description: Stable scope identifier. Dots allowed for hierarchical naming (e.g., `home.research.infra`).

parent_scope_ref.description: Dotted-path reference to parent scope (e.g., `home.research`). Empty = root of this OU.

inheritance_mode.description: How memory from the parent scope flows into this scope. `full` = read-all inheritance; `isolated` = no inheritance; `selective` = uses the selective_inheritance block below.

selective_inheritance.description: Only consulted when inheritance_mode=selective. Lists which parent representations / type memories are inherited.

from_types.description: Type names whose memory inherits from the parent scope.

retention_override.description: Optional per-scope retention override. If set, wins over the parent MemoryPolicy for memories scoped here.
